Unlike Chinese people, the ones in the West believe in star signs. Western world has a complete system  of star signs, and they explain them and use them to tell a person's characteristics and the things they like or dislike. There are a cycle of 12 of them in all. All of them are decided by the date instead of the year of your birth and each of them has its own characteristics.

Sagittarius (November 23--December 21)
